user_message: Michael Petrov at Humongous Insurance just sent this. Help me assess the risk.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-14 10:05 EST
Subject: escalation triage - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with escalation triage. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
Date: 2024-02-21 13:16 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Humongous Insurance

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about escalation triage. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Michael Petrov <michael.petrov@humongousins.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-27 15:13 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Humongous Insurance escalation triage

There's been a change in our timeline for escalation triage. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Humongous Insurance: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Cross-Sell Trigger Email template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
